item.title: Curly Hair Stylist Winnipeg | Curly Hair Specialist
item.description:
Curly Hair Specialist

Specialized curly hair styling that enhances natural texture while providing manageability. Includes personalized product recommendations and styling techniques for maintaining beautiful curls at home.

The Look

Technique: Curl-enhancing cut that works with natural texture

Styling: Defined, frizz-free curls with bounce and shine

Philosophy: Working with curls, not fighting against them

Results: Manageable, beautiful curls that last between washes

Services Performed

  • Curl Assessment: Analyzed curl pattern, porosity, and styling challenges
  • Specialized Cut: Curly-cutting technique (dry cut for precision)
  • Deep Conditioning: Intensive moisture treatment for curl health
  • Styling Lesson: Demonstration of proper curl care and styling
  • Product Recommendations: Curated product routine for home care
  • Diffuser Drying: Gentle drying to enhance curl pattern

Time & Details

Total Service Time: 90 minutes

item.title: Gray Blending Winnipeg | Natural Gray Coverage
item.description:
Natural Gray Blending

Beautiful gray blending that maintains the natural beauty of silver hairs while providing dimension and preventing the harsh line of demarcation. A sophisticated approach to mature hair care that embraces natural beauty while offering polish and refinement.

The Look

Technique: Demi-permanent color blending for natural results

Result: Soft, dimensional color that incorporates gray rather than completely hiding it

Finish: Shiny, healthy-looking hair with movement and depth

Philosophy: Enhanced natural beauty, not artificial coverage

item.title: Beach Waves Hair Winnipeg | Effortless Wavy Style
item.description:
Romantic Beach Waves

Effortless beach waves that create natural volume and movement. This style works beautifully for both casual outings and special occasions, providing that perfect “just stepped off the beach” look.

The Look

Style: Loose, flowing waves with natural movement

Texture: Piecey, undone finish (not too perfect)

Volume: Fullness at the roots and throughout

Vibe: Casual, romantic, and effortlessly chic

Services Performed

  • Preparation: Volumizing wash and lightweight conditioner
  • Root Lift: Mousse applied at roots for volume
  • Wave Creation: Large barrel curling iron for loose waves
  • Cooling: Pinned and cooled to set the wave pattern
  • Breaking: Texturizing spray to break up curls into waves
  • Finishing: Flexible hold hairspray for movement

Time & Details

Total Service Time: 45 minutes

item.title: Evening Updo Winnipeg | Special Occasion Formal Hair
item.description:
Glamorous Evening Updo

Stunning evening updo perfect for weddings, galas, or special events. Features soft, romantic curls with elegant styling that holds throughout the evening while maintaining comfort.

The Look

Style: Low chignon with romantic face-framing curls

Details: Intricate pinned curls with soft volume at crown

Accessories: Pearl accents for timeless elegance

Hold: Professional-strength products for all-night security

Services Performed

  • Trial Consultation: Discussed dress style, event venue, and personal taste
  • Preparation: Clean, dry hair prepped with volumizing and holding products
  • Base Creation: Structured foundation for the updo
  • Curl Formation: Pin curls set for romantic, bouncy curls
  • Chignon Construction: Classic low bun with refined finish
  • Face-Framing: Soft tendrils to soften and frame the face
  • Accessory Placement: Pearl pins strategically placed
  • Final Secure: Strong-hold hairspray for confidence

Time & Details

Total Service Time: 75 minutes

item.title: Brunette Hair Color Winnipeg | Rich Brown Color
item.description:
Elegant Brunette Transformation

A stunning transformation featuring rich brunette color with strategically placed highlights to add dimension and movement. The soft layers create natural volume while maintaining a sophisticated, polished look perfect for professional settings.

The Look

Base Color: Rich chocolate brown with warm undertones

Highlights: Caramel and mocha tones woven throughout for dimension

Cut: Shoulder-length layers for movement and volume

Finish: Glossy, smooth, and full of shine

Services Performed

  • Color Consultation: Analyzed skin tone and natural hair color for perfect shade selection
  • Single Process Color: Applied rich brown base from roots to ends
  • Partial Highlights: Face-framing caramel highlights for brightness
  • Gloss Treatment: Sealed cuticle and added incredible shine
  • Precision Cut: Layered cut to remove old color and add shape
  • Professional Styling: Voluminous blowout with waves to showcase the color

Time & Details

Total Service Time: 2.5 hours

item.title: Classic Bob Haircut Winnipeg | Modern Bob Style
item.description:
Classic Bob Transformation

A sophisticated bob transformation that brings out natural texture while maintaining a polished, professional look. Perfect for the modern Winnipeg professional who wants effortless style with minimal maintenance.

The Look

Cut: Modern bob with subtle face-framing layers

Length: Hits at the jawline - the most flattering length for most face shapes

Styling: Sleek and smooth with a slight bend at the ends for softness

Finish: Professional blowout with shine-enhancing products

item.title: Luxury Balayage Blonde Winnipeg | Natural Highlights
item.description:
Balayage Blonde Transformation

This stunning balayage transformation creates natural, sun-kissed dimension with golden blonde tones throughout. The hand-painted technique results in a soft, grow-out-friendly look that requires minimal maintenance.

The Look

Color Technique: Hand-painted balayage for a natural, lived-in blonde

Base Level: Natural dark blonde to light brown

Highlights: Golden and honey blonde tones placed strategically to frame the face and add movement

Final Result: Multi-dimensional blonde with depth, shine, and natural-looking dimension

item.title: Bridal Updo Winnipeg | Elegant Wedding Hair
item.description:
Bridal Elegance Updo

An exquisite bridal updo combining classic elegance with modern romance. Soft waves cascade from a structured chignon, creating a timeless look that complements any wedding dress style.

The Look

Style: Low chignon with face-framing soft waves

Details: Perfectly placed pin curls, romantic volume at the crown, and a clean finish that lasts all day

Accessories: Fresh floral accents that can be customized to match your wedding colors

item.title: Color Melt Hair Winnipeg | Seamless Color Transition
item.description:
Modern Color Melt

A contemporary color melt technique creating seamless transitions between complementary tones. This low-maintenance look grows out beautifully while maintaining depth and dimension throughout the hair.

The Look

Technique: Color melt - gradual transition between shades

Color Story: Dark roots melting into caramel and golden ends

Finish: Glossy, multidimensional with incredible shine

Effect: Natural, lived-in color that appears to have developed naturally

Services Performed

  • Color Consultation: Selected complementary shades for melt effect
  • Base Color: Applied darker brunette at roots
  • Mid-Tone Color: Transitional caramel through mid-lengths
  • End Color: Golden blonde on ends
  • Blending: Careful application where colors meet for seamless transition
  • Gloss Treatment: Sealed cuticle and added incredible shine
  • Styling: Voluminous waves to showcase color dimension

Time & Details

Total Service Time: 2.5 hours

item.title: Men's Executive Haircut Winnipeg | Professional Men's Grooming
item.description:
Men’s Executive Cut

Clean, professional men’s cut perfect for the corporate environment. Includes precision styling and beard grooming for a complete executive look that maintains throughout the work week.

The Look

Cut: Business taper with clean lines and professional polish

Beard: Precision trim with crisp edges

Styling: Neat, controlled, and office-appropriate

Finish: Matte products for natural, not shiny, appearance

Services Performed

  • Consultation: Discussed industry standards and personal style preferences
  • Precision Haircut: Scissor-over-comb technique for refined finish
  • Taper Fade: Clean transition at neckline and sideburns
  • Beard Trim: Shaped and maintained for professional appearance
  • Line-Up: Crisp edges for clean, groomed look
  • Styling: Professional product application for all-day hold

Time & Details

Total Service Time: 30 minutes

item.title: About Hair@Home | Winnipeg Mobile Hair Stylist Since 2007
item.description:
Your Neighborhood Mobile Hair Stylist in Winnipeg

As a trusted local hair stylist serving hundreds of happy Winnipeg clients, I bring reliable and affordable hair care directly to your home. I believe great hair shouldn’t come with salon prices or travel hassles - that’s why I offer the same quality results you want, with better value and convenience built right in.

Whether you need a quick trim for the family, a practical style for work, or a special occasion look, I come fully equipped with everything needed to get the job done right. My mobile service means you get professional results without leaving your home, saving you both time and money.

item.title: Book Mobile Hair Appointment Winnipeg | Easy Scheduling
item.description:
How to Book Your Appointment

Booking your mobile hair service is simple and convenient. Fill out the form below, and I’ll contact you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment and discuss any specific requirements.

What to Expect

Once you submit your booking request:

  1. Confirmation: I’ll contact you within 24 hours to confirm availability
  2. Consultation: We’ll discuss your hair needs and practical requirements
  3. Preparation: I’ll arrive 15 minutes early to set up my mobile service station
  4. Service: Enjoy reliable hair services that save you time and hassle
  5. Aftercare: Receive practical tips for maintaining your style at home

Preparation Tips

  • Ensure adequate lighting and access to an electrical outlet
  • Have a comfortable chair available
  • For longer services, access to water is helpful but not required
  • Remove any valuable items from the service area
  • Wear a button-up shirt for easy changing after color services

Payment Options

  • Cash
  • E-transfer
  • Credit card (mobile terminal available)

A 25% deposit may be required for first-time clients or services over $200.

item.title: Booking Confirmation
item.description:
<h1 class="confirmation-title">Booking Request Received!</h1>
<p class="confirmation-message">
 Thank you for choosing Hair@Home! We've received your appointment request and will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your booking.
</p>

<div class="next-steps">
 <h2>What Happens Next?</h2>
 <div class="steps">
 <div class="step">
 <div class="step-number">1</div>
 <div class="step-content">
 <h3>Confirmation Call</h3>
 <p>We'll call or text you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment time and discuss any specific requirements.</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 <div class="step">
 <div class="step-number">2</div>
 <div class="step-content">
 <h3>Preparation</h3>
 <p>We'll arrive 15 minutes early to set up our mobile service station at your location.</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 <div class="step">
 <div class="step-number">3</div>
 <div class="step-content">
 <h3>Service Day</h3>
 <p>Enjoy professional hair services in the comfort of your home!</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="payment-info">
 <h2>Payment Information</h2>
 <p>As requested, we accept:</p>
 <ul>
 <li><strong>Interac e-Transfer:</strong> Send to info@hairathome.ca</li>
 <li><strong>Cash:</strong> Pay directly on service day</li>
 </ul>
</div>

<div class="contact-info">
 <h2>Need to Make Changes?</h2>
 <p>If you need to modify or cancel your booking, please contact us:</p>
 <div class="contact-methods">
 <div class="contact-item">
 <strong>Phone:</strong> <a href="tel:2045550123">(204) 555-0123</a>
 </div>
 <div class="contact-item">
 <strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:info@hairathome.ca">info@hairathome.ca</a>
 </div>
 </div>
</div>

<div class="actions">
 <a href="/" class="btn btn-primary">Return to Home</a>
 <a href="/services/" class="btn btn-secondary">Browse Services</a>
</div>

item.title: Frequently Asked Questions
item.description:
Service & Booking

What areas in Winnipeg do you serve? We proudly serve all areas within Winnipeg, including Central, South, West, and North Winnipeg. Our mobile salon travels throughout the city limits, so you can enjoy professional hair services wherever you are in Winnipeg. Areas include:

  • Downtown Winnipeg (Exchange District, The Forks, Osborne Village)
  • South Winnipeg (St. Boniface, St. Vital, Fort Garry)
  • West Winnipeg (Charleswood, St. James, Assiniboine Park)
  • North Winnipeg (Seven Oaks, River Heights, St. Johns)
  • East Winnipeg (Transcona, Elmwood)

How long does a mobile hair appointment take? Appointment length varies depending on the service:

item.title: Service Areas Winnipeg | Mobile Hair Coverage
item.description:
Complete Winnipeg Coverage

Hair@Home proudly serves all areas within Winnipeg city limits. Our mobile salon is fully equipped to travel throughout the city, bringing professional hair services directly to your doorstep.

Service Areas by Region

Central Winnipeg

Downtown, Exchange District, Wolseley, Osborne Village

  • Perfect for busy professionals
  • Office visits available during business hours
  • Easy parking and access for mobile setup

South Winnipeg

Fort Garry, St. Vital, St. Boniface, Transcona

  • Residential services available
  • Flexible scheduling for families
  • Weekend and evening appointments

West Winnipeg

Charleswood, St. James, Fort Richmond, Headingley

item.title: Bridal & Special Occasion Hair Winnipeg | Mobile Formal Styling
item.description:
Stunning updos and formal styles for your most important moments. Wedding hair, prom styling, graduation looks, and special occasion styling - all at your location.

Special Occasion Services & Pricing

  • Simple Updo: $35
  • Formal Updo: $45
  • Bridal Styling: $50
  • Bridal Party Packages: Available (contact for pricing)

Special Occasion Styles Explained

Simple Updo ($35)

Elegant, sophisticated styles for formal occasions.

Perfect for:

  • Weddings (guest or party member)
  • Graduation ceremonies
  • Anniversary dinners
  • Professional events

Styles include: Classic chignons, French twists, low buns, and elegant pulled-back styles.

item.title: Hair Treatments Winnipeg | Deep Conditioning & Scalp Care
item.description:
Add-on treatments to keep your hair healthy and looking its best between regular cuts and color services.

Treatment Services & Pricing

  • Deep Conditioning: $15
  • Scalp Treatment: $20
  • Repair Treatment: $25
  • Bond Builder: +$20 (add-on to color)

All treatments are add-on services and can be combined with any haircut, color, or styling service.

Treatment Options Explained

Deep Conditioning ($15)

Perfect for dry, thirsty hair that needs moisture and shine.

What it does:

item.title: Mobile Blowout & Styling Winnipeg | At-Home Hair Styling
item.description:
Professional blowout and styling services to help you look your best without leaving home. Perfect for special occasions, events, or simply treating yourself.

Blowout & Styling Services & Pricing

  • Basic Blowout: $20
  • Blowout with Round Brush Styling: $25
  • Special Occasion Styling: $35
  • Updo/Formal Style: $35-50 (see Special Occasion services)

Your Blowout Experience

What to Expect

When you book a blowout with Hair@Home:

  1. Consultation - Discuss the look you want and what’s achievable for your hair type
  2. Wash & Condition - Professional shampoo and conditioning treatment
  3. Prep - Heat protectant products applied
  4. Drying - Professional blowout technique for smooth, voluminous results
  5. Styling - Finishing touches, curls, or straightening as desired
  6. Setting - Products to help your style last

Before Your Appointment

  • Come with dirty hair (or I can wash it - either way works!)
  • Have inspiration photos ready if you have a specific look in mind
  • Ensure adequate lighting and access to an electrical outlet
  • Wear a button-up or loose top to avoid disturbing your style afterward

After Your Appointment

  • Your blowout should last 3-5 days with proper care
  • Sleep on a silk or satin pillowcase to reduce frizz
  • Use a shower cap when bathing
  • Refresh with dry shampoo between washes

Perfect For

Special Events: Weddings, parties, reunions, galas - look polished and put-together

item.title: Mobile Hair Color Winnipeg | At-Home Color Services
item.description:
Professional color services at fair prices. From root touch-ups to full color, I bring salon-quality color services directly to your home.

Color Services & Pricing

  • Root touch-up: $45
  • Single process color: $55
  • Partial highlights: $55
  • Full highlights: $65
  • Balayage: Contact for pricing (depends on length and density)

Your Color Service Experience

Before Your Color Appointment

  • Avoid washing hair for 24-48 hours before coloring (natural oils help protect your scalp)
  • No other chemical treatments for 2 weeks prior
  • Come with dry, unwashed hair
  • Wear a button-up shirt (avoid pulling clothes over your head after coloring)
  • Have photos of colors you like ready for consultation

During Your Visit

I arrive fully equipped for professional color services:

item.title: Mobile Haircuts Winnipeg | $20-30 At-Home Haircuts
item.description:
Quality haircuts at straightforward prices. No surprises, no salon markup. I bring everything needed for a professional haircut experience right to your door.

Pricing

  • Adults: $30
  • Seniors (60+): $25
  • Kids (12 & under): $20

Your Haircut Experience

When you book a mobile haircut with Hair@Home, here’s what to expect:

Before Your Appointment

  • Wear comfortable clothing
  • Come with clean, dry hair (or I can wash for you)
  • Have a chair available in a well-lit area
  • Think about the style you want - I’m happy to consult!

During Your Visit

I arrive fully equipped with:

item.title: Mobile Men's Haircuts Winnipeg | At-Home Barber Services
item.description:
Straightforward men’s haircuts with professional quality. Fades, tapers, classic cuts, and beard services - all at your convenience.

Men’s Services & Pricing

  • Men’s Haircut: $25
  • Men’s Cut + Beard Trim: $30
  • Beard Trim Only: $10
  • Beard Line-Up: $10
  • Full Shave: $15

Your Men’s Cut Experience

What to Expect

When you book a men’s haircut with Hair@Home:

  1. Consultation - Discuss your preferred style, face shape, and maintenance routine
  2. Preparation - Cape application, hair sprayed and sectioned
  3. The Cut - Professional techniques using clippers and/or scissors
  4. Detail Work - Clean neckline, sideburns, and around ears
  5. Beard Work (if selected) - Trim, shape, or line-up
  6. Finishing - Styling products applied for a polished look

Before Your Appointment

  • Have an idea of the style you want (or I can suggest options)
  • Wear a button-up or loose shirt to avoid disturbing your look
  • Ensure adequate lighting in the area where we’ll set up
  • Come with clean, dry hair (or I can wash it for you)

After Your Appointment

  • Styling tips for maintaining your look at home
  • Product recommendations (no pressure - just helpful suggestions)
  • Information about when to schedule your next cut (typically 3-4 weeks)

Popular Men’s Styles

Fade Cuts

  • Low Fade: Subtle transition from skin to hair
  • Mid Fade: Balanced fade for a classic look
  • High Fade: Bold contrast, modern style
  • Skin/Bald Fade: Complete fade to skin for a sharp look

Classic Cuts

  • Crew Cut: Timeless, practical style
  • Side Part: Classic professional look
  • Ivy League: Longer crew cut, versatile styling
  • Textured Crop: Modern, textured finish

Taper Cuts

  • Taper Fade: Gradual fade at neckline and sideburns
  • Business Taper: Professional, conservative
  • Taper + Part: Clean business-appropriate style

Beard Services

Beard Trim ($10)

  • Clean up your beard shape
  • Even out length
  • Remove stray hairs
  • neckline and cheek line cleanup

Beard Line-Up ($10)

  • Crisp edges and clean lines
  • Shape your beard precisely
  • Perfect for maintaining a well-groomed look

Full Shave ($15)

  • Traditional straight razor or modern shaver
  • Hot towel preparation
  • soothing aftershave balm
  • Clean, smooth finish

Great For

Busy Professionals: Get a sharp, professional cut without taking time out of your work day.
